purpose: Contact storage + derivation. This story adds addContactByNpub, the manual npub-based contact-creation entry point: decodes/validates the npub, rejects self/duplicate/malformed input, creates or reactivates a StoredContact entry, and seeds knownPeers before any contacts-store write.

public_api.name: addContactByNpub
public_api.signature: addContactByNpub(npub: string, ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined): AddContactResult
public_api.description: Decodes npub via npubToPubkeyHex (nostrKeys.ts). Returns { ok: false, error: 'invalid_npub' } on decode failure with no storage mutation. Returns { ok: false, error: 'self' } if the decoded pubkey case-insensitively equals ownPubkeyHex, with no storage mutation. Returns { ok: false, error: 'already_exists' } if an active (non-archived) StoredContact already exists for the pubkey, with no field changed. Otherwise seeds knownPeers via rememberKnownPeers([pubkeyHex]) BEFORE any contacts-store write (load-bearing ordering, ADR-005 / architecture.md Implementation constraints), then either unarchiveContact + rememberContact (archived case, returns reactivated: true) or rememberContact alone (new-contact case, returns reactivated: false).

public_api.name: AddContactResult
public_api.signature: export type AddContactResult = { ok: true; pubkeyHex: string; reactivated: boolean } | { ok: false; error: 'invalid_npub' | 'self' | 'already_exists' }
public_api.description: Frozen seam contract (stories.json seams[0]) between S1 (this story, contacts.ts) and S2 (AddContactModal.tsx, consumes the return shape only, not internals).

owned_data: localStorage['lp_contacts_v1'] (StoredContact map) — unchanged ownership, no new keys introduced
dependencies_allowed: app/src/lib/walledGarden.ts (isAllowedDmSender, WhitelistArgs) — already an existing contacts.ts dependency, unchanged
external_ports: localStorage (via existing readStoredContacts/writeStoredContacts, rememberContact, unarchiveContact helpers)
